title: Car Hire
tagline: Drive today. Return when you're done.
body: Daily, weekly, and monthly rates for individuals and corporates. Choose from our fleet of sedans, SUVs, and vans.

title: Vehicle Import
tagline: We find it. We clear it. You drive it.
body: We source and clear vehicles from Japan, UK, and UAE. We handle inspection, shipping, and registration.

title: Fleet Management
tagline: Corporate vehicles for businesses that keep moving.
body: Corporate accounts with dedicated account managers and regular servicing for your business fleet.

title: Equipment Rental
tagline: Get the right machine for your project.
body: Construction and logistics equipment for projects across Kenya. Generators, forklifts, and more.
